negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing scheduled-pool block expiry, scheduled stale lifetime expiry, and chain-halt eviction of scheduled pool plus Scheduler state; only async block/time expiry is present.
related_but_insufficient_code: Async pool has block-based cleanup_expired and wall-clock cleanup_expired_by_time using contract_expiry_block/time references.
Scheduled pool block/time cleanup and chain-halt scheduler-state eviction are absent.

rationale: The expiry lineage begins with dual block/time eviction for async and scheduled transactions, then bounded newer candidates refine scheduled expiry to per-execution expiry_block() and split routine age cleanup from poisonous chain-halt cleanup of scheduler state.
statement: Async and scheduled pool entries must be evicted by block-based expiry during canonicalization and by configured queued lifetime during canonicalization or maintenance ticks; scheduled transaction expiry is computed per execution from expiry_block(), routine age eviction removes pool instances while preserving scheduler jobs, and chain-halt detection evicts scheduled jobs from scheduler state before ordinary lifetime eviction can mask poison.
suggested_falsification_tests: Insert async and scheduled transactions with expired block TTLs and assert canonicalization removes them, classifying async entries by block expiry before time expiry.
Insert stale async and scheduled transactions while block height is unchanged, advance the stale eviction maintenance interval, and assert time-based eviction removes the stale pool entries.
Create scheduled transactions whose computed expiry_block is below, equal to, and above current_block and assert cleanup removes only current_block > expiry_block.

Simulate a chain halt where wall-clock seconds exceed latest block timestamp by the halt threshold and assert all scheduled transactions are removed from the pool and scheduler state; simulate routine age expiry without halt and assert scheduler jobs remain.
summary: Async and scheduled pool expiry rules are incomplete.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Run async and scheduled block/time/chain-halt expiry fixtures; current port can only satisfy async cleanup portions.
title: Async and scheduled pools expire by block, time, and chain-halt rules
